description: You are a Cloud FinOps analyst preparing a dashboard for the monthly infrastructure cost review. Leadership wants to see resource efficiency ratios rather than raw utilization numbers. Create a Graphite dashboard named exactly 'Cost Efficiency Ratios' containing four graphs using specific transformation functions. The graph titled 'Network per CPU' must use the target divideSeries(servers.ec2_instance_1.network.bytes_in, servers.ec2_instance_1.cpu.utilization). The graph titled 'Fleet CPU Aggregate' must use the target alias(sumSeries(servers.ec2_instance_1.cpu.utilization, servers.ec2_instance_2.cpu.utilization, servers.ec2_instance_3.cpu.cloudwatch_utilization), 'Total Fleet CPU') without using wildcards. The graph titled 'Disk IO per Request' must use the target divideSeries(servers.ec2_instance_1.disk.write_bytes, servers.load_balancer.requests.count). The graph titled 'Hourly CPU Summary' must use the target summarize(servers.ec2_instance_2.cpu.utilization, '1h', 'avg'). Save the dashboard upon completion.
